description.zh: CTF杂项方向题目的详细解题指南，包括文件隐写、图片隐写、音频隐写、流量分析、取证分析等。
description.en: Detailed guide for CTF misc challenges, covering file steganography, image steganography, audio steganography, traffic analysis, forensics.

content.zh: 分析CTF杂项题目的常见类型和解题技巧
content.en: Analyze common types and solving techniques of CTF misc challenges

annotation.zh: 用户请求杂项题目分析

content.zh: 杂项题目范围广泛，包括文件隐写、流量分析、取证分析等。需要掌握各类文件格式和常用工具，如 binwalk、StegSolve、Audacity、Wireshark 等。
content.en: Misc challenges cover wide range including file steganography, traffic analysis, forensics. Need to master various file formats and tools like binwalk, StegSolve, Audacity, Wireshark.

content.zh: 使用 binwalk 分析 Word 文档，发现实际为 ZIP 压缩包
content.en: Use binwalk to analyze Word document, discover it's actually a ZIP archive

codeBlocks.code:
binwalk word.docx

DECIMAL       HEXADECIMAL     DESCRIPTION
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
0             0x0             Zip archive data...
8139          0x1FCB          Zip archive data, name: word/media/image1.jpg

caption.zh: 发现 docx 实际为 zip 格式
caption.en: Discover docx is actually zip format

caption.zh: 解压后获得隐藏图片及 flag
caption.en: Extract to get hidden image and flag

annotation.zh: 文件格式识别与隐写示例
annotation.en: File format identification and steganography example

content.zh: 解压后发现 image1.jpg 包含 flag
content.en: After extraction, image1.jpg contains the flag

content.zh: 图片隐写常见技术：LSB 隐写、EXIF 信息、盲水印。遇到两张相似的图片优先考虑盲水印。
content.en: Common image steganography: LSB, EXIF, blind watermark. Consider blind watermark when seeing two similar images.

caption.zh: 使用 BlindWaterMark 工具提取盲水印
caption.en: Use BlindWaterMark tool to extract blind watermark

content.zh: 分析 SQL 注入流量包，通过二分法盲注特征提取 flag
content.en: Analyze SQL injection traffic packet, extract flag via binary blind injection characteristics

codeBlocks.code:
GET /ctf/Less-5/?id=1' and ascii(substr((select flag from t),1,1))=102--
GET /ctf/Less-5/?id=1' and ascii(substr((select flag from t),2,1))=108--
...

caption.zh: 流量中的盲注 payload 示例
caption.en: Example of blind injection payload in traffic

codeBlocks.code:
# 提取 ASCII 码并转换为字符
ascii_codes = [102,108,97,103,123,119,49,114,101,115,104,65,82,75,95,101,122,95,49,115,110,116,105,116,125]
flag = ''.join(chr(c) for c in ascii_codes)
print(flag)  # flag{w1reshARK_ez_1snt}

annotation.zh: SQL 注入流量分析示例

content.zh: 取证分析：从流量中导出 webshell 加密通信，逆向解密脚本后获取备份压缩包密码，最终得到 AES 加密的 flag。
content.en: Forensics: Export encrypted webshell communication from traffic, reverse the decryption script to get backup archive password, finally obtain AES-encrypted flag.

caption.zh: 木马中的异或加密函数

codeBlocks.code:
# 从流量中提取 env 命令结果，得到 APACHE_RUN_USER=www-data
unzip -P www-data www.zip

caption.zh: 使用获取的密码解压备份文件
caption.en: Unzip backup file with obtained password

caption.zh: flag.php 中的 AES 密文

annotation.zh: 取证分析示例（webshell 解密与 AES 解密）
annotation.en: Forensics example (webshell decryption and AES decryption)

content.zh: 杂项题目需要广泛的知识储备和工具使用经验。常用工具：binwalk、foremost、StegSolve、Audacity、Wireshark、BlindWaterMark、CyberChef 等。
content.en: Misc challenges require broad knowledge and tool usage experience. Common tools: binwalk, foremost, StegSolve, Audacity, Wireshark, BlindWaterMark, CyberChef, etc.
